videos.title: The AI Revolution: What Is AI?
videos.description: Provides a high-level, visually engaging overview of what Artificial Intelligence is, its historical context, current state, and future potential, setting the stage for deeper learning.

videos.title: What is Artificial Intelligence? In 5 minutes.
videos.description: A concise explanation of Artificial Intelligence, differentiating between its various types (Narrow AI, General AI, Super AI) and clarifying common misconceptions, offering a solid definitional foundation.

videos.title: How AI is taught: Machine Learning and Deep Learning
videos.description: Introduces the fundamental concepts of Machine Learning and Deep Learning in a beginner-friendly way, explaining how AI systems learn from data to perform tasks and make decisions.

videos.title: Top 10 Artificial Intelligence Applications In 2024
videos.description: Showcases real-world applications of Artificial Intelligence across various industries and daily life, illustrating its practical impact and relevance in today's world.

videos.title: The Ethics of AI: Crash Course AI #14
videos.description: Explores the critical ethical challenges and societal implications arising from the development and deployment of artificial intelligence, prompting early critical thinking about responsible AI.

videos.title: What is MLOps? An introduction to MLOps
videos.description: Explains the core concepts of MLOps, how it streamlines the machine learning lifecycle, and its importance for deploying and managing AI models in production.

videos.title: Monetizing AI Models: Business Models
videos.description: Dive into various business models for monetizing AI and machine learning products, exploring strategies like SaaS, API access, consulting, and subscription services.

videos.title: Monetization Models for AI and ML Products | AI Product Management
videos.description: Focuses on different approaches to pricing and monetizing AI products, including value-based pricing, usage-based models, and the challenges specific to AI.

videos.title: How to Build and Launch a Successful AI Product
videos.description: Provides a strategic overview of the process from developing an AI product to successfully bringing it to market, including considerations for MVP and go-to-market strategy.
